title: “Pastores de Galicia”, guarantee of an artisan breeding way
subtitle: Lamb and kid of Galician pastures, quality and sustainability.
description: A guide to the Pastores de Galicia brand, which certifies lamb and goat meat from Galician extensive silvopastoral grazing systems to ensure origin, animal welfare, food safety and environmental sustainability. It outlines marketing and distribution strategies to raise consumer awareness and connect producers with markets for high-quality artisan meat products.
